refnamediv.refpurpose: plots as an histogram a probability distribution function

listitem.para: * namey = a time series, a real (nx1) vector or a string equal to the name of a time series or a (nx1) real vector between quotes
* n = # of bars of the histogram
* color = numerical representation of the color used for the bars

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Plots as an histogram the probability distribution function of a variable.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
